steps.t: Ingbert is on the Pelennor Fields just ahead of you. You have begun your foray from King's End to discover the Enemy's new commander and should now ta…
The Orc encampment is ahead. Duilin and Derufin have been slain by the Haradrim and their Mûmakil. You should flee into the nearby Orc encampment.
Imrahil is at the cross-roads to the north of the Hillock. You should speak to him about what is to be done.
